name: The Doomsday Clock Reads 3 A.M.
text:
Check the actual time on the loudest player's phone. Put that many doom counters on the Doomsday Clock, where 1:00 = one, 2:00 = two, and so on (a.m. and p.m. both count; nobody is sleeping through this).
Then, if it is genuinely between midnight and 4 a.m. in the room right now, you win the game and everyone should go to bed. Otherwise, you gain X life and a creeping sense that it's later than you think.
flavorText: It is always 3 a.m. somewhere, and that somewhere is inside Brother Eschaton's head.
